item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT

item.title: ServSafe Manager Class - 07/10/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/17/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The ServSafe Manager course will be offered on July 10th and 17th. This class will consist of an instructor-led class with a 9th edition ServSafe manager textbook and online exam voucher included.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: ServSafe Manager Class on Jul 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include 9th edition textbook and online exam voucher.

item.title: Middle School Robotics Summer Camp - 07/13/2026 8:00am EDT to 07/13/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get ready for an exciting day of robotics at Tiffin University! You’ll learn the basics, write simple code and work with a team to complete fun robot missions in a real university lab. No experience needed – just bring your curiosity. • Explore how robots move, respond to code and are controlled through programming. • Complete navigation, obstacle courses, accuracy tasks and timed problem-solving activities in teams. • Use hands-on robotic programming including Sphero BOLT and Dobot Magician Lite, plus see live demos of the NAO humanoid robot and Spot the robot dog. • Gain coding experience, teamwork skills, STEM exposure and celebrate the day with a mini showcase. • Open to middle school students grades 6-8.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Middle School Robotics Summer Camp on Jul 13, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include School and coding experience.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/13/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/13/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 107 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Steinmetz Signs & Graphic Ink (SSG Ink - Shortened)
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 13, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin wild goose chase and tiffin's wild goose chase.

item.title: Special Hours 7.13 and 7.14 - 07/13/2026 5:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 105 E Tiffin St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA We are excited to offer special hours for UP Big Boy 4014’s return to Fostoria. July 13 hours: 5p-9p July 14 hours: 11a-7p Stop in and see us!

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Special Hours 7.13 and 7.14 on Jul 13, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include up big boy 4014 and Food & Drink.

item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null

item.yodel:media_alt_text: 6p | Pioneer Workshop: Candle Making on Jul 13, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community events and pioneer workshop.

item.title: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study - 07/13/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/13/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us for Celebrate Recovery Bible Study Monday nights at 6pm. A group for everyone, as we deal with the hurts, hang ups, and habits in life. Bring your family, friends, and neighbors. A time of Bible Study, sharing life, and fellowship. No childcare is provided.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study on Jul 13, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include celebrate recovery and celebrate recovery bible study.

item.title: Puzzle Party for Adults and Teens - 07/13/2026 6:30pm EDT to 07/13/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Registration required and will open up two weeks prior to the event. Sign up at the library or by calling 419-426-3825
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Puzzle Party for Adults and Teens on Jul 13, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include Arts and adults.

item.title: July CNA Session - 07/14/2026 12:00am UTC to 07/14/2026 11:59pm UTC
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Becoming a Nurse Aide may be for you! Nurse Aides provide a variety of care-related tasks such as dressing, feeding and observing patients. Nurse Aides usually work in long-term care facilities, home health agencies, assisted living facilities and hospitals. After completing this course, students will be prepared to take the State written and competency exam. State exam fees are not included in the cost of this class. State exams are completed through D & S Diversified Technologies. Clinical locations will be announced in class. Before the first day of class, students must read and sign a code of conduct contract. A Terra State Kern Center representative will go over this contract with you when you register. All classes will take place at the Fostoria Learning Center. 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830 CONTACT(419) 559-2464kern@terra.edu 75 hours total 59 hours in class time 16 hours of Clinicals Cost: $950/student, first state test fee included. Max Class Size: 8 Before Clinicals each student will need following: TB Test Physical *Scholarships available to eligible learners. For scholarship information, contact via email or phone: eriehle01@terra.edu / 419-559-2255
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Learning Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: July CNA Session on Jul 14, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. This is an all-day event with themes including Classes/Workshops and clinical locations.

item.title: "Colored Pencil Cherry Pie" Tuesday, July 14, 2026 9am-12pm #07142601 - 07/14/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/14/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA In this class you will use colored pencils to create a 5"x7" drawing of a slice of cherry pie, learning about strokes and blending techniques. All supplies are provided. Preregistration is required by Friday, July 10. Minimum class size is 3 people. The cost is $45 for TAG members & $55 for non-members. Contact Mike Fink (813-695-0506), or TAG (419-443-0478), or tiffinartguild@att.net with questions. You can also stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Colored Pencil Cherry Pie" Tuesday, July 14, 2026 9am-12pm #07142601 on Jul 14, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Classes/Workshops and art class.

item.title: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | July 14, 2026 Experience - 07/14/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/14/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 3101 N Township Rd 47, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA BIG BOY 4014 IS COMING BACK TO FOSTORIA Union Pacific's Big Boy No. 4014 returns to Fostoria on Tuesday, July 14, 2026, for a special public display during its Coast-to-Coast Tour Eastern Leg celebrating America’s 250th anniversary! This is your opportunity to get up close to the world’s largest operating steam locomotive as thousands of visitors gather in Fostoria for this historic event and community-wide experience. Tuesday, July 14, 2026 Big Boy No. 4014 is scheduled to be on public display from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM at the Norfolk Southern Fostoria Automotive Distribution Center. Visitors will have the opportunity to experience the world’s largest operating steam locomotive up close in one of America’s most historic railroad communities. This day will be more than a train stop, it will be a community-wide experience throughout Fostoria. Visitors are encouraged to explore local restaurants, shops, attractions, special events, and experiences happening across the city as Fostoria celebrates this once-in-a-lifetime event. More information, updates, local offers, and visitor details at: http://BigBoyFostoria.com/ Experience the Legend, Experience Fostoria.
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | July 14, 2026 Experience on Jul 14, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include steam locomotive and visitors.

item.title: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | July 14, 2026 Experience - 07/14/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/14/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 3101 N Township Rd 47, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA BIG BOY 4014 IS COMING BACK TO FOSTORIA Union Pacific's Big Boy No. 4014 returns to Fostoria on Tuesday, July 14, 2026, for a special public display during its Coast-to-Coast Tour Eastern Leg celebrating America’s 250th anniversary! This is your opportunity to get up close to the world’s largest operating steam locomotive as thousands of visitors gather in Fostoria for this historic event and community-wide experience. Tuesday, July 14, 2026 Big Boy No. 4014 is scheduled to be on public display from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM at the Norfolk Southern Fostoria Automotive Distribution Center. Visitors will have the opportunity to experience the world’s largest operating steam locomotive up close in one of America’s most historic railroad communities. This day will be more than a train stop, it will be a community-wide experience throughout Fostoria. Visitors are encouraged to explore local restaurants, shops, attractions, special events, and experiences happening across the city as Fostoria celebrates this once-in-a-lifetime event. More information, updates, local offers, and visitor details at: http://BigBoyFostoria.com/ Experience the Legend, Experience Fostoria.
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | July 14, 2026 Experience on Jul 14, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria and fostoria, ohio.

item.title: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | July 14, 2026 Experience - 07/14/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/14/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 3101 N Township Rd 47, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us on July 14, 2026, as Union Pacific's Big Boy No. 4014 returns to Fostoria, OH, for a special public display during its Coast-to-Coast Tour, commemorating America's 250th anniversary. From 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM at the Norfolk Southern Fostoria Automotive Distribution Center, visitors can get an up-close view of the world’s largest operating steam locomotive. This historic event promises to be more than just a train stop; it will transform Fostoria into a vibrant community experience. Attendees are encouraged to explore local restaurants, shops, attractions, and participate in special events across the city. Don't miss this incredible opportunity to experience the legend of Big Boy while celebrating the rich history of Fostoria. For more information, visit http://BigBoyFostoria.com/.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Rail Preservation Society
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | July 14, 2026 Experience on Jul 14, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include big boy 4014 and community experience.

item.title: Union Pacific's Big Boy No. 4014 Display at Norfolk Southern Fostoria Automotive Distribution Center - 07/14/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/14/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 3101 N Township Rd 47, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Up-Close Rail Experience! Union Pacific’s Big Boy No. 4014, the world’s largest operating steam locomotive, is coming to town! A public display is planned from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM on Tuesday, July 14 at the Norfolk Southern Fostoria Automotive Distribution Center. This is officially one of the best opportunities in the region to see this incredible machine up close.
item.dc:creator: Decatur County Republican Party
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Union Pacific's Big Boy No. 4014 Display at Norfolk Southern Fostoria Automotive Distribution Center on Jul 14, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include public display and republican party.

item.title: 10:30a | Family Storytime - 07/14/2026 10:30am EDT to 07/14/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library for “Family Storytime” on Tuesdays, July 7, 14, and 21 at 10:30 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This engaging program, part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story,” features stories, songs, rhymes, games, and activities suitable for the whole family. All ages are welcome, and no registration is required. For more information, visit the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or go to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 10:30a | Family Storytime on Jul 14, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include stories songs rhymes games and summer reading program.

item.title: Summer Storytime - 07/14/2026 10:30am EDT to 07/14/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Story Time is best suited for almost 3 year-olds through Kindergarten, lasts for 45-60 minutes, and includes stories, songs, extension activities & a craft.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Storytime on Jul 14, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include extension activities and kindergarten.

item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Grab And Go Lunches For Kids are each Tuesday in June and July 12pm-1pm, or until they run out, at FNC Hope Community Center.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Grab And Go Lunches on Jul 14, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include Food & Drink and community center.

item.title: Homemade Scent Jars - Seneca Conservation District - 07/14/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Conservation District for the Homemade Scent Jars event. To participate, please call Allen Eiry at 419-448-9774 to sign up.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/14/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 107 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.

item.title: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! - 07/14/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for "Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition!" at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library, happening on Tuesdays, July 7, 14, and 21 from 2:00 p.m. to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This weekly hangout is open to teens entering grades 6 through 12 and will feature games, snacks, crafts, and more, as part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program "Unearth a Story." For more details, visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! on Jul 14, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and games snacks crafts.

item.title: History in the Making | Unofficial World Record Attempt During Big Boy 4014 Fostoria - 07/14/2026 4:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 225 Atha Ave, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA History in the Making | Join Fostoria's Unofficial World Record Attempt! Sign up and learn more: http://BigBoyFostoria.com/ Be part of history in Fostoria! Following the public display of Union Pacific Big Boy No. 4014, we're inviting 400 participants to help create the Largest Human Image of a Train during an attempt to set an unofficial world record at the Fostoria Iron Triangle Rail Park. Thanks to the generosity of an anonymous local donor, the first 400 registered participants will receive a complimentary commemorative black event t-shirt (2XL only), produced locally by Beyond Laser Creations in Downtown Fostoria. Please arrive at the Fostoria Iron Triangle Rail Park by 3:30pm for check in on Tuesday, July 14. Participants will be assigned to designated sections before the record attempt. The official photo and record attempt will begin at approximately 4pm. If registrations exceed 400 participants, additional registrations will automatically be placed on a waitlist. We'll notify you if additional spots become available. Additional event details, parking information, and check-in instructions will be emailed prior to July 14.
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: History in the Making | Unofficial World Record Attempt During Big Boy 4014 Fostoria on Jul 14, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include commemorative t-shirt and fostoria.

item.title: History in the Making | Unofficial World Record Attempt During Big Boy 4014 Fostoria - 07/14/2026 4:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 225 Atha Ave, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA History in the Making | Join Fostoria's Unofficial World Record Attempt! Sign up and learn more: http://BigBoyFostoria.com/ Be part of history in Fostoria! Following the public display of Union Pacific Big Boy No. 4014, we're inviting 400 participants to help create the Largest Human Image of a Train during an attempt to set an unofficial world record at the Fostoria Iron Triangle Rail Park. Thanks to the generosity of an anonymous local donor, the first 400 registered participants will receive a complimentary commemorative black event t-shirt (2XL only), produced locally by Beyond Laser Creations in Downtown Fostoria. Please arrive at the Fostoria Iron Triangle Rail Park by 3:30pm for check in on Tuesday, July 14. Participants will be assigned to designated sections before the record attempt. The official photo and record attempt will begin at approximately 4pm. If registrations exceed 400 participants, additional registrations will automatically be placed on a waitlist. We'll notify you if additional spots become available. Additional event details, parking information, and check-in instructions will be emailed prior to July 14.
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: History in the Making | Unofficial World Record Attempt During Big Boy 4014 Fostoria on Jul 14, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include human image of a train and participants.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Community Dinner on Jul 14, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include community dinner and dinner.

item.title: World of Outlaws Ohio Logistics Brad Doty Classic - 07/14/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 10:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Attica, OH 44807, USA A huge week of Ohio Sprint Car racing continues as the Brad Doty Classic brings the World of Outlaws NOS Energy Drink Sprint Cars to Attica Raceway Park for the second and final time in 2026!
item.dc:creator: Attica Raceway
item.yodel:media_alt_text: World of Outlaws Ohio Logistics Brad Doty Classic on Jul 14, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include sprint cars and world of outlaws.

item.title: World of Outlaws Ohio Logistics Brad Doty Classic - 07/14/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 10:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Attica, OH 44807, USA A huge week of Ohio Sprint Car racing continues as the Brad Doty Classic brings the World of Outlaws NOS Energy Drink Sprint Cars to Attica Raceway Park for the second and final time in 2026!
item.dc:creator: World of Outlaws Sprint Car Series
item.yodel:media_alt_text: World of Outlaws Ohio Logistics Brad Doty Classic on Jul 14, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include Sports, Adult and Outdoors.

item.title: World of Outlaws Ohio Logistics Brad Doty Classic - 07/14/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 10:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Attica, OH 44807, USA A huge week of Ohio Sprint Car racing continues as the Brad Doty Classic brings the World of Outlaws NOS Energy Drink Sprint Cars to Attica Raceway Park for the second and final time in 2026!

item.yodel:media_alt_text: World of Outlaws Ohio Logistics Brad Doty Classic on Jul 14, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include brad doty classic and ohio sprint car racing.

item.title: Adult Program- Dig Into Charcuterie with Deb - 07/14/2026 6:30pm EDT to 07/14/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Registration is required. Registration will open up two weeks before the date of the program. Sign up at the library or by calling 419-426-3825.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Adult Program- Dig Into Charcuterie with Deb on Jul 14, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include registration required and seneca east public library.

item.title: July CNA Session - 07/15/2026 12:00am UTC to 07/15/2026 11:59pm UTC
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Becoming a Nurse Aide may be for you! Nurse Aides provide a variety of care-related tasks such as dressing, feeding and observing patients. Nurse Aides usually work in long-term care facilities, home health agencies, assisted living facilities and hospitals. After completing this course, students will be prepared to take the State written and competency exam. State exam fees are not included in the cost of this class. State exams are completed through D & S Diversified Technologies. Clinical locations will be announced in class. Before the first day of class, students must read and sign a code of conduct contract. A Terra State Kern Center representative will go over this contract with you when you register. All classes will take place at the Fostoria Learning Center. 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830 CONTACT(419) 559-2464kern@terra.edu 75 hours total 59 hours in class time 16 hours of Clinicals Cost: $950/student, first state test fee included. Max Class Size: 8 Before Clinicals each student will need following: TB Test Physical *Scholarships available to eligible learners. For scholarship information, contact via email or phone: eriehle01@terra.edu / 419-559-2255
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Learning Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: July CNA Session on Jul 15, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. This is an all-day event with themes including clinical hours and long-term care.

item.title: Bloomville Lions Club Fundraiser Dinner - 07/15/2026 4:30am EDT to 07/15/2026 5:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Meal Includes: 2 Sandwiches - choise of Pulled Pork or Shredded Chicken (two of the same) Baked Beans, Coleslaw, Dessert. Enjoy a delicius meal while supporting a great cause!
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bloomville Lions Club Fundraiser Dinner on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include pulled pork and shredded chicken.

item.title: High School Robotics Summer Camp - 07/15/2026 8:00am EDT to 07/15/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get ready for an exciting day of robotics at Tiffin University! You’ll learn the basics, write simple code and work with a team to complete fun robot missions in a real university lab. No experience needed – just bring your curiosity. • Explore how robots move, respond to code and are controlled through programming. • Complete navigation, obstacle courses, accuracy tasks and timed problem-solving activities in teams. • Use hands-on robotic programming including Sphero BOLT and Dobot Magician Lite, plus see live demos of the NAO humanoid robot and Spot the robot dog. • Gain coding experience, teamwork skills, STEM exposure and celebrate the day with a mini showcase. • Open to high school students grades 9-12.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University
item.yodel:media_alt_text: High School Robotics Summer Camp on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and stem exposure.

item.title: Rubber Ducky Wednesday - 07/15/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/15/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Rubber Ducky Wednesday” on Wednesdays, July 1, 8, 15, and 22 at 11:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Babies age birth to 35 months and their caregivers are invited to a story time on July 1, July 8, and July 15 with books, songs and lap bounces. On July 22, join the Library for a play date with toys and books for the babies to enjoy together. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Rubber Ducky Wednesday on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and story time.

item.title: Collaborative Luncheon | July - 07/15/2026 11:30am EDT to 07/15/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 168 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Welcome to the Seneca County Collaborative Luncheon series, where you have a seat at the table for a gathering filled with networking, education, promotion, and impact. On the menu… Date & Time: Wednesday, July 15, 2026 11:30 AM: Doors Open 11:30 AM - 12 PM: Networking 12 PM - 1 PM: Program Location: Tiffin University’s Osceola Theatre Featured Speaker: LeSean Shaw, CEO Actual Reality Technologies Topic: Beyond ChatGPT: Building an AI Toolkit for Everyday Success Registration: $25 for members and non-members Our luncheon series is designed to provide a comprehensive experience that embodies the mission of the Collaborative and allows our organization to best serve you. Reserve your seat today at: https://senecaregionalchamberofcommerceoh.growthzoneapp.com/ap/Events/Register/52FavZVtbCWCq Experience the Collaborative one bite at a time. See you at the luncheon!
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Collaborative Luncheon | July on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include networking and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/15/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 47 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Simply Shop Local
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include local businesses and seasonal.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/15/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 4:00pm EDT

Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer activities and support local.

Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. item.description: Location : 92 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.

item.title: Free Swim Day at the City Pool! - YLFCU - 07/15/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 491 Coe St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Sponsored by Your Legacy Federal Credit Union, Come beat the heat for free on Wednesday, July 15th! Regular pool hours 1-7PM
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Free Swim Day at the City Pool! - YLFCU on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community event and free swim day.

item.title: Canoe and Kayak Float - 07/15/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Spend the afternoon with Linda Rose on the pond paddling around and enjoying the sights that nature has to offer.  Canoes, kayaks, paddles and life jackets are provided.  Registration is required as there is a limited number of canoes and kayaks. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Canoe and Kayak Float on Jul 15, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include linda rose and nature sights.

item.title: Teen Musical Movie & Sing-Along - 07/15/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library for a "Teen Musical Movie and Sing-Along" on Wednesday, July 15, from 2:00 to 5:15 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This exciting event is open to teens entering grades six through twelve and features a popular award-winning historical musical. Attendees can enjoy pizza while singing along to unforgettable numbers or simply soaking in the energy of the film with friends. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more details, call 419-447-3751 or visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Musical Movie & Sing-Along on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer reading program.

item.title: Dine to Donate for CASA of SSW - 07/15/2026 4:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 69 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Save yourself from the "What's for dinner?" debate!

Skip the meal planning, avoid the dishes, and let Heavenly Pizza handle dinner on Wednesday, July 15, from 4–8 PM.

It's a two-for-one: your family gets a delicious meal, and 15% of sales will help CASA of SSW recruit and train volunteers to give a voice to abused and neglected children in our community.

Now that's a dinner decision you can feel good about!
item.dc:creator: CASA of SSW
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Dine to Donate for CASA of SSW on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include help children and pizza.

item.title: Playdough Play Date - 07/15/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Build, mold and create with Playdough and your friends! For toddlers - grade 2.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Playdough Play Date on Jul 15, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include toddler and playdough play date.

item.title: Wednesday Night Bible Study - 07/15/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us at 6pm Wednesday Nights for Bible Study through the book of Acts. Everyone is welcome. Childcare is not provided. Contact us with any questions.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Wednesday Night Bible Study on Jul 15, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include wednesday night bible study and wednesday nights.

item.title: The Herbal Cocktail Camp - 07/15/2026 6:30pm EDT to 07/15/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA If your summer hosting game needs an upgrade, this is the class for you! Don't serve your friends another basic vodka soda with a sad, shriveled lime wedge! You and your reputation deserve better. Welcome to Herbal Cocktail Camp, a masterclass for cocktail enthusiasts and anyone who wants to drink their medicine with a splash of spirits. We are stripping away the pretentious mixology attitude and replacing it with plant magic, liquid alchemy, and a healthy dose of sass.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The Herbal Cocktail Camp on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include liquid alchemy and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: July CNA Session - 07/16/2026 12:00am UTC to 07/16/2026 11:59pm UTC
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Becoming a Nurse Aide may be for you! Nurse Aides provide a variety of care-related tasks such as dressing, feeding and observing patients. Nurse Aides usually work in long-term care facilities, home health agencies, assisted living facilities and hospitals. After completing this course, students will be prepared to take the State written and competency exam. State exam fees are not included in the cost of this class. State exams are completed through D & S Diversified Technologies. Clinical locations will be announced in class. Before the first day of class, students must read and sign a code of conduct contract. A Terra State Kern Center representative will go over this contract with you when you register. All classes will take place at the Fostoria Learning Center. 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830 CONTACT(419) 559-2464kern@terra.edu 75 hours total 59 hours in class time 16 hours of Clinicals Cost: $950/student, first state test fee included. Max Class Size: 8 Before Clinicals each student will need following: TB Test Physical *Scholarships available to eligible learners. For scholarship information, contact via email or phone: eriehle01@terra.edu / 419-559-2255
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Learning Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: July CNA Session on Jul 16, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. This is an all-day event with themes including scholarships available and Health & Fitness.
